template_source: none; bootstrap task created before skill-owned templates were finalized

scope.target: Narrow dev-workflow and establish skill-owned development and AI-context workflow templates and lifecycle routing.

validation: Canonical specs, wrappers, references, templates, and human guides agree

results.summary: Narrowed dev-workflow to the software/product development lifecycle, gave it a complete skill-owned locator/plan/task/review template set, and assigned AI-context audit/remediation lifecycle ownership to ai-context-auditor and ai-context-governance with separate templates and reports.
